dialogueIntentSubtext.probe: tests whether the other speaker can bear the unsoftened truth
dialogueIntentSubtext.deflect: turns confession sideways to protect status and control
dialogueIntentSubtext.commit: makes risk sound practical enough to become a promise
dialogueIntentSubtext.warn: tries to protect the bond by narrowing the next available move
dialogueIntentSubtext.challenge: refuses the easier story and forces the pressure into view
dialogueIntentSubtext.reframe: changes the moral meaning of what was just said
dialogueIntentSubtext.answer-honestly: gives away more vulnerability than strategy intended
dialogueIntentSubtext.tease-probe: uses wit to test whether the wound can be named safely
dialogueIntentSubtext.name-risk: speaks the consequence both speakers hoped could stay implied

dialogueIntentReactions.probe: The question lands harder than either speaker planned.
dialogueIntentReactions.deflect: The evasion makes the silence more visible than the answer would have.
dialogueIntentReactions.commit: The promise raises the stakes for the next exchange.
dialogueIntentReactions.warn: The warning narrows what can still be done safely.
dialogueIntentReactions.challenge: The challenge strips politeness away from the scene.
dialogueIntentReactions.reframe: The new framing makes the old position harder to keep.
dialogueIntentReactions.answer-honestly: The honesty changes the balance of power in the room.
dialogueIntentReactions.tease-probe: The joke opens a bruise neither speaker can ignore now.
dialogueIntentReactions.name-risk: Naming the risk turns pressure into irreversible commitment.
